title: Groundwork of Evangelion artbooks getting digital re release
display_title: Groundwork of Evangelion artbooks getting digital re release
wikitext:
[]: Groundwork of Evangelion artbooks getting digital re-release             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Mon Jun 08, 2020 9:23 pm Volumes 1-3 of the artbooks are out now on digital platforms in Japan. Both End of Evangelion Groundwork artbooks will also be released soon, no date said for them. These reprints also each have 30+ new additional color pages in them, selected by Anno. Full info on each artbook: Groundwork of Evangelion Vol. 1 - Price: 2,000 yen (minus tax) - Pages: 22 pages in color+196 B&W pages, plus additional 36 pages in color for digital release - 256 pages total Groundwork of Evangelion Vol. 2 - Price: 2,000 yen (minus tax) - Pages: 24 pages in color+226 B&W pages, plus additional 34 pages in color for digital release - 288 pages total Groundwork of Evangelion Vol. 3 - Price: 2,400 yen (minus tax) - Pages: 20 pages in color+294 B&W pages, plus additional 34 pages in color for digital release - 350 pages total Groundwork of EVANGELION The Movie 1 + Groundwork of EVANGELION The Movie 2 - Coming soon https://www.khara.co.jp/2020/06/09/gwofeva/

[]: Re: Groundwork of Evangelion artbooks getting digital re-release             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Mon Jul 06, 2020 10:01 pm "Groundwork of Evangelion The Movie 1" and "The Movie 2" have now been released as well. https://www.khara.co.jp/2020/07/07/gfetm/ Groundwork of EVANGELION The Movie 1 Price：2,800 yen（minus tax） 28P in color＋336P in B&W、additional 34P in color for digital release、total 400 pages Groundwork of EVANGELION The Movie 2 ・Price：2,800 yen（minus tax） 32P in color＋320P in B&W、additional 34P in color for digital release、total 388 pages Khara comments that they will continue to make more Eva-related books available digitally

[]: Re: Groundwork of Evangelion artbooks getting digital re-release             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jul 07, 2020 6:42 pm I kinda want the physical copies, though. I have Groundowrk books for VOL.2 and The Movie 1, as well as all of the "Rebuild" groundwork books. Great stuff in all of them. I always get inspired/jealous every time I thumb through them.

[]: Re: Groundwork of Evangelion artbooks getting digital re-release             Quote Post by cyharding » Tue Jul 07, 2020 7:09 pm I think the Evafan site is stating that these books will come with bonus color illustrations from Anno himself, but I'm not sure as Google translate is a fickle thing. https://eva-fan.com/blog-entry-6461.html

[]: Re: Groundwork of Evangelion artbooks getting digital re-release             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 07, 2020 9:18 pm Mentioned in the OP, cyharding. These reprints also each have 30+ new additional color pages in them, selected by Anno.
summary: []: Groundwork of Evangelion artbooks getting digital re-release             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Mon Jun 08, 2020 9:23 pm Volumes 1-3 of the artbooks are out now on digital platforms in Japan. Both End of Evangelion Groundwork artbooks will also be released soon, no date said for them. These reprints also each have 30+ new additional color pages in them, selected by Anno. Full info on each artbook: Groundwork of Evangelion Vol. 1
